commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 24:3 And David distributed them, both Zadok of the sons of Eleazar, and Ahimelech of the sons of Ithamar, according to their offices in their service. Ahimelech is styled also Achimelech and Abiathar, ver. (Calmet) Courses, twenty-four, which were to serve by lot, that no one might complain, as they were equally princes, ver. Dionisius styles Zachary "prince of the priests. "But the pontiff was over all.
